title: Schwantesia proxima
taxonomy: Schwantesia proxima is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the stone plants or succulent carpet plants. It belongs to the genus Schwantesia, which is a small genus of succulent plants. The classification of Schwantesia proxima is further detailed under the kingdom Plantae, with the rank of species. The plant is also known to be endemic to South Africa. This classification provides insight into the unique characteristics and growth habits of Schwantesia proxima.
